endpoints.name: GET /providers/Microsoft.Blueprint/operations
endpoints.description: List all of the available operations the Blueprint resource provider supports.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: GET /providers/Microsoft.Management/managementGroups/{managementGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Blueprint/blueprints
endpoints.description: List Blueprint definitions within a Management Group.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{MANAGEMENTGROUPNAME}} with a real managementgroupname.

endpoints.name: GET /providers/Microsoft.Management/managementGroups/{managementGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Blueprint/blueprints/{blueprintName}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{BLUEPRINTNAME}} with a real blueprintname. Replace {{MANAGEMENTGROUPNAME}} with a real managementgroupname.

endpoints.name: PUT /providers/Microsoft.Management/managementGroups/{managementGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Blueprint/blueprints/{blueprintName}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{BLUEPRINTNAME}} with a real blueprintname. Replace {{MANAGEMENTGROUPNAME}} with a real managementgroupname.

endpoints.name: DELETE /providers/Microsoft.Management/managementGroups/{managementGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Blueprint/blueprints/{blueprintName}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{BLUEPRINTNAME}} with a real blueprintname. Replace {{MANAGEMENTGROUPNAME}} with a real managementgroupname.

endpoints.name: GET /providers/Microsoft.Management/managementGroups/{managementGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Blueprint/blueprints/{blueprintName}/artifacts
endpoints.description: List artifacts for a given Blueprint.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{BLUEPRINTNAME}} with a real blueprintname. Replace {{MANAGEMENTGROUPNAME}} with a real managementgroupname.

endpoints.name: GET /providers/Microsoft.Management/managementGroups/{managementGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Blueprint/blueprints/{blueprintName}/artifacts/{artifactName}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{BLUEPRINTNAME}} with a real blueprintname. Replace {{MANAGEMENTGROUPNAME}} with a real managementgroupname. Replace {{ARTIFACTNAME}} with a real artifactname.

endpoints.name: PUT /providers/Microsoft.Management/managementGroups/{managementGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Blueprint/blueprints/{blueprintName}/artifacts/{artifactName}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{BLUEPRINTNAME}} with a real blueprintname. Replace {{MANAGEMENTGROUPNAME}} with a real managementgroupname. Replace {{ARTIFACTNAME}} with a real artifactname.

endpoints.name: DELETE /providers/Microsoft.Management/managementGroups/{managementGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Blueprint/blueprints/{blueprintName}/artifacts/{artifactName}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{BLUEPRINTNAME}} with a real blueprintname. Replace {{MANAGEMENTGROUPNAME}} with a real managementgroupname. Replace {{ARTIFACTNAME}} with a real artifactname.

endpoints.name: GET /providers/Microsoft.Management/managementGroups/{managementGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Blueprint/blueprints/{blueprintName}/versions
endpoints.description: List published versions of given Blueprint.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{BLUEPRINTNAME}} with a real blueprintname. Replace {{MANAGEMENTGROUPNAME}} with a real managementgroupname.

endpoints.name: GET /providers/Microsoft.Management/managementGroups/{managementGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Blueprint/blueprints/{blueprintName}/versions/{versionId}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{BLUEPRINTNAME}} with a real blueprintname. Replace {{MANAGEMENTGROUPNAME}} with a real managementgroupname. Replace {{VERSIONID}} with a real versionid.

endpoints.name: PUT /providers/Microsoft.Management/managementGroups/{managementGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Blueprint/blueprints/{blueprintName}/versions/{versionId}
endpoints.description: Publish a new version of the Blueprint with the latest artifacts. Published Blueprints are immutable.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{BLUEPRINTNAME}} with a real blueprintname. Replace {{MANAGEMENTGROUPNAME}} with a real managementgroupname. Replace {{VERSIONID}} with a real versionid.

endpoints.name: DELETE /providers/Microsoft.Management/managementGroups/{managementGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Blueprint/blueprints/{blueprintName}/versions/{versionId}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{BLUEPRINTNAME}} with a real blueprintname. Replace {{MANAGEMENTGROUPNAME}} with a real managementgroupname. Replace {{VERSIONID}} with a real versionid.

endpoints.name: GET /providers/Microsoft.Management/managementGroups/{managementGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Blueprint/blueprints/{blueprintName}/versions/{versionId}/artifacts
endpoints.description: List artifacts for a published Blueprint.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{BLUEPRINTNAME}} with a real blueprintname. Replace {{MANAGEMENTGROUPNAME}} with a real managementgroupname. Replace {{VERSIONID}} with a real versionid.

endpoints.name: GET /providers/Microsoft.Management/managementGroups/{managementGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Blueprint/blueprints/{blueprintName}/versions/{versionId}/artifacts/{artifactName}
endpoints.description: Get an artifact for a published Blueprint.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{BLUEPRINTNAME}} with a real blueprintname. Replace {{MANAGEMENTGROUPNAME}} with a real managementgroupname. Replace {{VERSIONID}} with a real versionid. Replace {{ARTIFACTNAME}} with a real artifactname.
